title: coleus deflexifolius
intro: Coleus deflexifolius is a species of flowering plant in the lamiaceae family, known for its distinctive foliage and medicinal properties. It is commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties. The health benefits of Coleus deflexifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it can be used as a tea, tincture, or topical application.
